customer.title: For customers
customer.description: Discover restaurants, place orders quickly, and follow your service flow in one place.

highlights.explore: Browse businesses and choose where you want to order.
highlights.selfOrder: Use self-ordering when available and track your order status in real time.
highlights.notifications: Receive confirmations and updates directly in the app.

customer.footer: Create your account to save your profile and start ordering faster.

business.title: For restaurants and bars
business.description: Run daily operations from one POS platform built for service speed and business control.

highlights.pos: Manage tables, sessions, and orders with a real-time POS workflow.
highlights.inventory: Track inventory, purchases, and supplier data connected to what you sell.
highlights.reports: Monitor performance with daily and monthly reporting dashboards.

business.footer: Create your business account to centralize operations, staff flow, and reporting.
